title: Mach 777
shortDescription: Cut5 HDPE lining. High impact, abrasion, cut & tear resistance. Black Nitrigrip & vibro-impact reinforced palm
description: Cut5 HDPE lining. High impact, abrasion, cut & tear resistance. Black Nitrigrip & vibro-impact reinforced palm

features: High impact, abrasion, cut & tear resistance
Grey back with black/lime IMPACT knuckle guard
7cm waterproof neoprene cuff with reflective tape
Hi-Viz TPR on back of fingers & thumb
Foamed padding on palm for anti-vibration
attributes.composition: Black nitrile foam coated palm; Three palm single density anti-vibration pads; Grey cut level 5 HDF 10gg shell; Neoprene 7cm gauntlet cuff; Black/Yellow high visibility TPR lobster finger impact protectors; Black knuckle and hand TPR impact padding; Reflective tape on front and back of cuff; Grey leatherette continuous pull
